special_mechanics.name: Ship Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a Cybernoid ship in a shoot 'em up context with flip-screen navigation rather than traditional platformer movement

special_mechanics.name: Power-ups System
special_mechanics.description: Collectible power-ups including rear-gun and giant spiked ball that flies around the ship

special_mechanics.name: Special Weapons
special_mechanics.description: Built-in special weapons including shields and homing missiles

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Cybernoid is a shoot 'em up, not a traditional platformer. Wikipedia source provides game overview but no movement physics parameters. No quantitative movement, gravity, or jump mechanics documented. Game known for smooth animation and fast gameplay but specific physics values are unavailable.
